recommendations.title: My Dinner with Andre
recommendations.overview: Two old friends meet for dinner; as one tells anecdotes detailing his experiences, the other notices their differing worldviews.

recommendations.title: Pretty Baby
recommendations.overview: In 1917 New Orleans, a 12-year-old girl is raised in a brothel by her prostitute mother.

recommendations.title: La Dolce Vita
recommendations.overview: Episodic journey of journalist Marcello who struggles to find his place in the world, torn between the allure of Rome's elite social scene and the stifling domesticity offered by his girlfriend, all the while searching for a way to become a serious w

recommendations.title: Roma
recommendations.overview: A virtually plotless, gaudy, impressionistic portrait of Rome through the eyes of one of its most famous citizens.

recommendations.title: Damage
recommendations.overview: The life of a respected British politician at the height of his career crumbles when he becomes obsessed with his son's lover.

recommendations.title: Zazie dans le Métro
recommendations.overview: A brash and precocious ten-year-old comes to Paris for a whirlwind weekend with her rakish uncle.

recommendations.title: The Fire Within
recommendations.overview: Depressed Alain Leroy leaves the clinic where he was detoxified. He meets friends, acquaintances and women, trying to find a reason to continue living.

recommendations.title: Elevator to the Gallows
recommendations.overview: A self-assured businessman murders his employer, husband of his mistress, which unintentionally provokes an ill-fated chain of events.

recommendations.title: 8½
recommendations.overview: Guido Anselmi, a film director, finds himself creatively barren at the peak of his career. Urged by his doctors to rest, Anselmi heads for a luxurious resort, but a sorry group gathers—his producer, staff, actors, wife, mistress, and relatives—each o

recommendations.title: Atlantic City
recommendations.overview: In a corrupt city, a small-time gangster and the estranged wife of a pot dealer find themselves thrown together in an escapade of love, money, drugs and danger.
